name: Wasabi
description: Wasabi Hot Cloud Storage — S3-compatible object storage at $6.99/TB/month with no egress fees. Critical caveat: Wasabi enforces a 90-day minimum storage duration — objects deleted before 90 days are billed for the full 90-day period anyway, so churny workloads are a poor fit. Bucket-scoped REST with AWS SigV4 against s3.{region}.wasabisys.com. Regions: us-east-1, us-east-2, us-central-1, us-west-1, ca-central-1, eu-central-1, eu-central-2, eu-west-1, eu-west-2, ap-northeast-1, ap-northeast-2, ap-southeast-1, ap-southeast-2. Generate access keys at console.wasabisys.com → Access Keys.

credential_fields.name: region
credential_fields.label: Region
credential_fields.description: Wasabi region of your bucket — e.g. us-east-1, eu-central-1, ap-northeast-1. Note: us-east-1 uses the legacy hostname s3.wasabisys.com but the regional form (s3.us-east-1.wasabisys.com) also works and is preferred here.

credential_fields.name: access_key_id
credential_fields.label: Wasabi Access Key
credential_fields.description: From console.wasabisys.com → Access Keys → Create New Access Key. Scope to a sub-user with bucket-level policy where possible — root keys grant account-wide access.

credential_fields.name: secret_access_key
credential_fields.label: Wasabi Secret Key
credential_fields.description: Returned at creation alongside the access key. Cannot be retrieved later — regenerate if lost.

tools.name: list_objects
tools.description: List objects in a bucket (S3-compatible ListObjectsV2). Returns XML; parse Contents[].Key / Size / LastModified, plus IsTruncated + NextContinuationToken for pagination.

prefix.description: Filter to keys starting with this prefix.

continuation-token.description: Pagination cursor from a prior IsTruncated response.

tools.name: put_object
tools.description: Upload an object. Pass content as 'body'; runner sends verbatim with SigV4 integrity hash. Wasabi caps single PUT at 5GB; use multipart for larger.

body.description: Object content. Bytes welcome — the runner sends them verbatim.

tools.name: get_object
tools.description: Download an object. Response body is the raw object bytes (response cap 200MB).

tools.name: delete_object
tools.description: Delete a single object. Returns 204. WARNING: deletes within the 90-day minimum-retention window are still billed through day 90 — you save no money by deleting early.

tools.name: list_buckets
tools.description: List all Wasabi buckets the access key can see. Returns XML; ListAllMyBucketsResult.Buckets.Bucket[] has names + creation dates.
